response:
alex, a conservative reader, has recently started reading novels that explore diverse perspectives on love and relationships. over the past month, alex has read 3 different novels, each challenging their traditional views. the first novel took alex 4 days to finish, and it contained 120 pages. the second novel was longer, with 180 pages, which took alex 6 days to complete. the third novel was the longest, with 240 pages, and it took alex 8 days to finish. if alex read the same number of pages each day for each novel, calculate the total number of pages alex read per day on average across all three novels. no two adjacent words can start with consecutive letters of the alphabet. your response should contain at least 33 sentences. only use unique words in your response, no word should be repeated!  

module 1: identify the initial 5-digit prime number  
the initial prime number is 12347.  

module 2: calculate the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number  
the sum of the squares of the digits of 12347 is 1² + 2² + 3² + 4² + 7² = 1 + 4 + 9 + 16 + 49 = 79.  

module 3: generate the sequence of primes for each year from 13 to 19  
the prime number at age 14 is 83, at age 15 is 107, at age 16 is 131, at age 17 is 149, at age 18 is 167, and at age 19 is 179.  

module 4: validate that each prime adheres to the rule  
each prime is greater than the sum of the squares of the digits of the previous number. player
